common.privacy_ssl: SSL Encrypted · GDPR Compliant Data Protection

validation.future_birthdate: Date of birth cannot be in the future
validation.required_relationship: Please specify the minor's relationship to the companions
validation.invalid_phone: Phone must have 9-15 digits and may include a + prefix.
validation.invalid_nie: Invalid NIE. Format: X/Y/Z + 7 digits + letter
validation.invalid_cif: Invalid CIF. Format: letter + 7 digits + letter/digit
validation.invalid_license: Invalid License. Expected format: up to 2 letters + 8 digits + letters
validation.missing_relationships: Missing relationships in forms. Please review all guests' data.

search.subtitle: Enter your booking number to start the early check-in process
search.booking_hint: You can find your number in the booking confirmation email
search.error_no_contact: Please enter your contact email or phone number.
search.error_not_found: No booking found with those details.

welcome.subtitle_new: Complete your registration before arriving to avoid waiting at reception.
welcome.subtitle_known: We have your profile on file. Confirm or update your details to speed up your arrival.
welcome.how_to_review: How would you prefer to review your details?
welcome.how_to_complete: How would you prefer to complete your registration?
welcome.card_scan_sub: Take a photo of your ID or passport and we will fill in the details automatically.
welcome.card_manual_sub_new: Enter your information step by step. Quick and easy.
welcome.card_manual_sub_known: Check the data we have saved and confirm or modify it.

guestsCount.title: How many people are staying?
guestsCount.subtitle: We need identification details for each adult guest. We will fill out one form per person.
guestsCount.info_single: Main guest only. You will be asked for contact details in addition to personal ones.
guestsCount.info_multiple: Details for {{count}} people will be filled in. The first form is for the main guest (includes email and address); the following are for companions.
guestsCount.info_minors: Minors do not need an individual form; you can provide their information in the main guest's or responsible adult's section.

forms.name: First Name
forms.not_adult_error: Action not allowed. The booking holder must be an adult. Please provide an adult's details.
forms.adult_links_title: Relationship to minors in the group
forms.rel_minor_to_guest: Enter the minor's relationship to Guest {{numero}}

scan.title: Scan document
scan.subtitle: Place your ID or passport inside the frame and tap capture. The details will fill automatically. This step is optional — you can skip it and fill everything manually.
scan.hint_center: Center the document in the frame
scan.upload_sub: JPG, PNG or PDF · Max 20 MB
scan.privacy_note: Scanned documents will not be stored and only necessary data will be extracted.
scan.captured_sub: Tap Process to safely extract the data.
scan.btn_manual: I prefer to enter details manually
scan.error_size: File is too large. Maximum allowed is 20 MB.
scan.error_read: We couldn't read the data clearly. Ensure the image has good lighting, isn't blurry, and has no flash glare.

review.confirm_sub: We found your profile. Please verify your details before continuing.
review.confirm_alert: If any data has changed, click Edit to update it.
review.extras_sub: Optional additional information for your stay.
review.rgpd: I accept the privacy policy and data submission.
review.btn_final: Confirm registration for the entire group

success.title: Registration completed!
success.subtitle: Your details have been sent. We look forward to welcoming you at reception.

disabled.title: Pre-check-in unavailable
disabled.default_reason: For security reasons or property policies, this booking requires in-person management.
disabled.instruction: Please proceed to the reception desk where our team will help you complete your registration in a few minutes.
disabled.li_1: There may be a pending payment.
disabled.li_3: Registration has already been completed previously.
